description: Discovers the exact registry name for a car brand when the user's input might not match exactly. Use when you are unsure of the exact stored brand name — especially for brands with non-obvious registry names (Alfa Romeo stored as ALFA, Mercedes stored as MERCEDES-BENZ). Returns all matching brand names with their car counts. After finding the exact brand name, use dmr-car-brand-models to list models.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE brand RLIKE ?brand_pattern AND count >= 5 AND brand IS NOT NULL | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20

brand_pattern.description: Case-insensitive regex pattern to find matching brand names. Examples: (?i).*alfa.* to find Alfa Romeo, (?i).*mercedes.* to find MERCEDES-BENZ, (?i).*rover.* to find LAND ROVER, (?i).*polestar.* to find Polestar.
